name: HearthCode
headline: Warm-neutral code color language
summary: A warm, low-glare color philosophy for code interfaces and reading surfaces.
positioning: One palette philosophy translated across editors, documents, and web surfaces.

variantPhilosophy.dark: Warm default for mixed-light daily work.
variantPhilosophy.darkSoft: Lower-stimulation night focus without losing structure.
variantPhilosophy.lightSoft: Gentle long-form light with calmer daytime contrast.
